sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_packets FROM {table_name}

query_description: Number of distinct source IP addresses
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT srcip) AS n_src_ips FROM {table_name}

query_description: Number of packets sent by each source IP
sql: SELECT srcip, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcip ORDER BY pkts DESC

query_description: Number of distinct destination IP addresses
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dstip) AS n_dst_ips FROM {table_name}

query_description: Number of packets received by each destination IP
sql: SELECT dstip, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstip ORDER BY pkts DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT srcport) AS n_src_ports FROM {table_name}
SELECT srcport, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dstport) AS n_dst_ports FROM {table_name}
SELECT dstport, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT proto) AS n_protocols FROM {table_name}
SELECT proto, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY proto

SELECT
            CAST(FLOOR(time / 1000000) AS BIGINT) AS bucket,
            COUNT(*) AS pkts
        FROM {table_name}
        GROUP BY bucket
        ORDER BY bucket

query_description: Total packet bytes (sum of packet lengths)
sql: SELECT SUM(pkt_len) AS total_bytes FROM {table_name}
SELECT AVG(pkt_len) AS avg_pkt_len FROM {table_name}

SELECT
            CAST(FLOOR(pkt_len / 1) * 1 AS INT) AS len_bucket,
            COUNT(*) AS pkts
        FROM {table_name}
        GROUP BY len_bucket
        ORDER BY len_bucket
SELECT srcport, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY pkts DESC
SELECT srcport, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY bytes DESC

query_description: Distinct source IPs per source port
sql: SELECT srcport, COUNT(DISTINCT srcip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination IPs per source port
sql: SELECT srcport, COUNT(DISTINCT dstip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct destination ports per source port
sql: SELECT srcport, COUNT(DISTINCT dstport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY n DESC, srcport ASC

query_description: Distinct `(dstip, dstport)` pairs per source port
sql: SELECT srcport, COUNT(DISTINCT (dstip, dstport)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY srcport ORDER BY n DESC

SELECT srcport,
                   COUNT(
                       DISTINCT (srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto)
                   ) AS n
            FROM {table_name}
            GROUP BY srcport
            ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Number of packets per destination port
sql: SELECT dstport, COUNT(*) AS pkts FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY pkts DESC
SELECT dstport, SUM(pkt_len) AS bytes FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY bytes DESC

query_description: Distinct Destination IPs per source port
sql: SELECT dstport, COUNT(DISTINCT dstip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY n DESC, dstport ASC

query_description: Distinct source IPs per destination port
sql: SELECT dstport, COUNT(DISTINCT srcip) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct source ports per destination port
sql: SELECT dstport, COUNT(DISTINCT srcport) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY n DESC

query_description: Distinct `(srcip, srcport)` pairs per destination port
sql: SELECT dstport, COUNT(DISTINCT (srcip, srcport)) AS n FROM {table_name} GROUP BY dstport ORDER BY n DESC

SELECT dstport,
                   COUNT(
                       DISTINCT (srcip, dstip, srcport, dstport, proto)
                   ) AS n
            FROM {table_name}
            GROUP BY dstport
            ORDER BY n DESC
